body: {"detail":"Three gaps prevent standalone execution without consulting FEAT-010. (1) Ref namespace is undefined: description uses refs/ddx/candidates/\u003cbead-id\u003e/\u003ccycle-or-attempt\u003e while AC item 1 uses \u003ccycle\u003e, and the 'or the exact namespace defined by the spec bead' hedge defers the authoritative form to FEAT-010 вЂ” choosing one over the other is a product-semantic decision that cannot be made safely here. (2) 'attempt bundle/run record' is undefined: no file path, struct name, or schema is given for where base_rev/candidate_rev/candidate_ref/cycle_index are persisted; an agent executing this bead cannot pick a concrete storage location without either inventing one or reading FEAT-010. (3) Retention policy is deferred to spec without inlining the required behavior: AC item 4 says 'artifact metadata is durable' without defining what durable means operationally (which file, which field, what write barrier). All three require FEAT-010 content to be inlined into the description before a sub-agent can execute, and doing so would require reading that spec вЂ” which is outside the scope of a safe rewrite.","intake_outcome":"ambiguous_needs_human"}

{"rationale":"All 8 rubric criteria satisfied. Title is imperative and names both subsystem (agent) and change. Description supplies PROBLEM, ROOT CAUSE WITH FILE:LINE (three concrete locations with line ranges), PROPOSED FIX, and NON-SCOPE. AC is numbered, each item is verifiable, four named Test* functions are present (TestCandidateRefStore_ProjectRootReachable, _MetadataRecorded, _EventRecorded, _RetentionPolicy), and the final two items are the broad `go test` green gate and `lefthook run pre-commit passes`. Labels carry phase:2, area:agent, area:git, kind:feature, adr:024, and spec:FEAT-010. Parent and dep are both explicit with dep context provided. No /tmp paths or chat references appear. A competent agent given only the bead body can identify which file to create, which structs to extend (ExecuteBeadResult, result.json), which ref namespace to write (refs/ddx/iterations/\u003cattempt-id\u003e/\u003ccycle-index\u003e), and which tests to run.","score":8,"suggested_fixes":[],"waivers_applied":[]}
